title: SDG 7: Remote electricity without battery-centric storage
prompt: Use TRIZ to solve this contradiction: A remote rural region needs fast, reliable electricity for growing demand, but the solution cannot be centered on battery storage. It must work under harsh logistics and maintenance constraints.

requiredCriteria.description: Delivers fast and reliable rural electricity.
Avoids battery-centric storage as the main architecture.
Uses modular microgrids, hybrid generation, or dispatch/control.

positiveSignals.description: Fits remote maintenance and logistics constraints.

forbiddenPatterns.description: Solves by freezing or suppressing demand growth.
